ddls:
CREATE TABLE "respondents" (
  "respondent_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each respondent */,
  "response_id" TEXT /* Response ID associated with the respondent */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the respondent */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the respondent */,
  "education" TEXT /* Education level of the respondent */,
  "income" REAL /* Income level of the respondent */,
  "party_affiliation" TEXT /* Party affiliation of the respondent */,
  "ideology" TEXT /* Ideology of the respondent */,
  "ethnicity" TEXT /* Ethnicity of the respondent */,
  "occupation" TEXT /* Occupation of the respondent */,
  "marital_status" TEXT /* Marital status of the respondent */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("respondent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "responses" (
  "response_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each response */,
  "respondent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the respondent who provided the response */,
  "survey_id" INTEGER /* ID of the survey or poll */,
  "question_id" INTEGER /* ID of the question being answered */,
  "answer" TEXT /* Answer provided by the respondent */,
  "response_date" TEXT /* Date the response was submitted */,
  "response_time" TEXT /* Time the response was submitted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("response_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_responses_question_id FOREIGN KEY ("question_id") REFERENCES questions ("question_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_responses_respondent_id FOREIGN KEY ("respondent_id") REFERENCES respondents ("respondent_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_responses_survey_id FOREIGN KEY ("survey_id") REFERENCES surveys ("survey_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "surveys" (
  "survey_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each survey or poll */,
  "survey_name" TEXT /* Name of the survey or poll */,
  "survey_date" TEXT /* Date the survey or poll was conducted */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the survey or poll */,
  "survey_type" TEXT /* Type of survey or poll (e.g., online, phone, in-person) */,
  "sample_size" INTEGER /* Sample size of the survey or poll */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("survey_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "questions" (
  "question_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each question */,
  "survey_id" INTEGER /* ID of the survey or poll the question belongs to */,
  "question_text" TEXT /* Text of the question */,
  "question_type" TEXT /* Type of question (e.g., multiple choice, open-ended) */,
  "question_order" INTEGER /* Order of the question in the survey or poll */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("question_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "answers" (
  "answer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each answer */,
  "question_id" INTEGER /* ID of the question the answer belongs to */,
  "answer_text" TEXT /* Text of the answer */,
  "answer_order" INTEGER /* Order of the answer in the question */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("answer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "voting_history" (
  "voting_history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each voting history record */,
  "respondent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the respondent */,
  "election_id" INTEGER /* ID of the election */,
  "vote" TEXT /* Vote cast by the respondent */,
  "voting_method" TEXT /* Method used to cast the vote (e.g., in-person, mail-in, online) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("voting_history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_voting_history_respondent_id FOREIGN KEY ("respondent_id") REFERENCES respondents ("respondent_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_voting_history_election_id FOREIGN KEY ("election_id") REFERENCES elections ("election_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "elections" (
  "election_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each election */,
  "election_name" TEXT /* Name of the election */,
  "election_date" TEXT /* Date of the election */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the election */,
  "election_type" TEXT /* Type of election (e.g., federal, state, local) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("election_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "demographics" (
  "demographic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each demographic record */,
  "respondent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the respondent */,
  "demographic_name" TEXT /* Name of the demographic characteristic */,
  "value" TEXT /* Value of the demographic characteristic */,
  "demographic_category" TEXT /* Category of the demographic characteristic (e.g., socioeconomic, cultural) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("demographic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographics_respondent_id FOREIGN KEY ("respondent_id") REFERENCES respondents ("respondent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "policy_issues" (
  "policy_issue_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each policy issue record */,
  "respondent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the respondent */,
  "policy_issue_name" TEXT /* Name of the policy issue */,
  "opinion" TEXT /* Opinion of the respondent on the policy issue */,
  "opinion_strength" TEXT /* Strength of the respondent's opinion (e.g., strongly support, somewhat oppose) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("policy_issue_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_policy_issues_respondent_id FOREIGN KEY ("respondent_id") REFERENCES respondents ("respondent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "candidates" (
  "candidate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each candidate */,
  "candidate_name" TEXT /* Name of the candidate */,
  "party_affiliation" TEXT /* Party affiliation of the candidate */,
  "ideology" TEXT /* Ideology of the candidate */,
  "candidate_type" TEXT /* Type of candidate (e.g., incumbent, challenger) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("candidate_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "candidate_votes" (
  "candidate_vote_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each candidate vote record */,
  "respondent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the respondent */,
  "candidate_id" INTEGER /* ID of the candidate */,
  "vote" TEXT /* Vote cast for the candidate */,
  "vote_confidence" TEXT /* Confidence level of the respondent's vote (e.g., very confident, somewhat uncertain) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("candidate_vote_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_candidate_votes_candidate_id FOREIGN KEY ("candidate_id") REFERENCES candidates ("candidate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_candidate_votes_respondent_id FOREIGN KEY ("respondent_id") REFERENCES respondents ("respondent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, analyst, administrator) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user (e.g., research, IT, management) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of access */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed by the user */,
  "access_method" TEXT /* Method used to access the system (e.g., login, logout, update) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "modules" (
  "module_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each module */,
  "module_name" TEXT /* Name of the module */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the module */,
  "module_type" TEXT /* Type of module (e.g., survey, poll, analysis) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("module_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "module_completion" (
  "module_completion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each module completion record */,
  "respondent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the respondent */,
  "module_id" INTEGER /* ID of the module */,
  "completion_status" TEXT /* Completion status of the module */,
  "completion_date" TEXT /* Date the module was completed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("module_completion_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_module_completion_module_id FOREIGN KEY ("module_id") REFERENCES modules ("module_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_module_completion_respondent_id FOREIGN KEY ("respondent_id") REFERENCES respondents ("respondent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "survey_invitations" (
  "invitation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each survey invitation */,
  "respondent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the respondent */,
  "survey_id" INTEGER /* ID of the survey */,
  "invitation_date" TEXT /* Date the survey invitation was sent */,
  "invitation_status" TEXT /* Status of the survey invitation (e.g., sent, completed, declined) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("invitation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_survey_invitations_respondent_id FOREIGN KEY ("respondent_id") REFERENCES respondents ("respondent_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_survey_invitations_survey_id FOREIGN KEY ("survey_id") REFERENCES surveys ("survey_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "respondent_devices" (
  "device_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each device */,
  "respondent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the respondent */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device (e.g., desktop, tablet, smartphone) */,
  "device_os" TEXT /* Operating system of the device */,
  "browser_type" TEXT /* Type of browser used on the device */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("device_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_respondent_devices_respondent_id FOREIGN KEY ("respondent_id") REFERENCES respondents ("respondent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "respondent_locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "respondent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the respondent */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the respondent */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the respondent */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the respondent */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the respondent */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_respondent_locations_respondent_id FOREIGN KEY ("respondent_id") REFERENCES respondents ("respondent_id")
)
